name: VEO3 AI Video Generator — Form + ChatGPT AI Prompt + fal.ai VEO3 + Google Drive + Gmail

parameters.content:
## VEO3 AI Video Generator — Form + ChatGPT AI Prompt + fal.ai VEO3 + Google Drive + Gmail

For creators and marketers who want to turn a one-line video idea into a finished, audio-rich clip without writing a complex prompt. You fill a form with a simple idea in plain English. A ChatGPT AI model converts it into a detailed, professional VEO3 prompt (subject, camera motion, lighting, audio, style). The optimized prompt is sent to fal.ai which runs Google's VEO3 model to generate an 8-second video with native audio. The workflow polls for completion, downloads the MP4, saves it to Google Drive, and emails you the link.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Video Request** collects your email, the video idea, and a style choice
- **2. AI Agent — Optimize VEO3 Prompt** turns the plain-English idea into a structured VEO3 prompt and a short title, returned as strict JSON
- **OpenAI Chat Model** the language model attached to the AI Agent
- **3. Code — Parse Prompt and Prepare** safely parses the JSON, builds a filename-safe title, and sets aspect ratio and duration
- **4. HTTP — Submit to fal.ai VEO3** queues the generation job and returns a request_id
- **5. Wait — 30 Seconds** gives VEO3 time before the first status check
- **6. HTTP — Check VEO3 Status** reads the job status
- **7. IF — Video COMPLETED?** routes to download when ready, otherwise to retry
- **7b. Wait — Retry 30s** waits then loops back to the status check
- **8. HTTP — Get Video URL** fetches the finished job result with the MP4 URL
- **9. HTTP — Download MP4** downloads the video binary
- **10. Google Drive — Save MP4** saves the file with the AI title as filename
- **11. Gmail — Send Video Link** emails you the Drive link

## Set up steps
1. **fal.ai API (runs VEO3)** — create a free account at https://fal.ai, make an API key at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys, and replace `YOUR_FAL_AI_API_KEY` in nodes 4, 6, and 8. VEO3 generation costs fal.ai credits — check current pricing at https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/veo3
2. **OpenAI** — in **OpenAI Chat Model**, connect your OpenAI API credential and pick any current ChatGPT model from the dropdown
3. **Google Drive** — create a folder for your videos, copy its folder ID from the URL after /folders/, replace `YOUR_GDRIVE_FOLDER_ID` in node 10, and connect Google Drive OAuth2
4. **Gmail** — connect Gmail OAuth2 in node 11. The recipient address comes from the form, so no email needs to be hard-coded
5. Activate the workflow, open the Form URL, type a video idea in plain English, and submit. Wait about 2-3 minutes and check your email for the Drive link

nodes.name: Section — Form Input and AI Prompt

parameters.content:
## Form Input and AI Prompt
User types a plain-English idea and picks a style. The ChatGPT AI model converts it into a detailed professional VEO3 prompt with all elements (subject, camera, lighting, audio).

## Submit, Poll, and Download
fal.ai VEO3 receives the prompt and returns a request_id. The workflow waits, checks status, and loops every 30s until COMPLETED, then fetches the result and downloads the MP4 binary.

nodes.name: Section — Save to Drive and Email

parameters.content:
## Save to Drive and Email
The MP4 is saved to Google Drive with the AI-generated title as filename. Gmail sends you the Drive link.

values.placeholder: user@example.com — video link will be sent here
Describe what you want in the video — e.g. A chef preparing fresh pasta in a modern kitchen, steam rising, upbeat background music

parameters.formDescription: Describe your video idea in plain English. AI will convert it into a professional VEO3 prompt and generate an 8-second video with native audio. You will receive a Google Drive link via email when ready.

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert VEO3 video prompt engineer. Convert a simple video idea into a detailed, professional VEO3 prompt that will generate a high-quality 8-second video.

All videos are 16:9 landscape format, 8 seconds long. Optimize for widescreen cinematic presentation.

Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no code fences, no explanation.

Return this exact structure:
{
  "title": "<short factual title 5-60 chars — describes what is shown, no emotional words like epic or magical>",
  "prompt": "<detailed VEO3 prompt 80-400 words — include: Subject (main focus), Context (setting/environment), Action (what happens), Style (film style), Camera Motion (dolly/tracking/aerial/static/pan), Composition (wide shot/close-up/medium), Ambiance (lighting/color/mood), Audio (ambient sounds, music description, any dialogue in quotes for lip-sync)>"
}

VEO3 PROMPT RULES:
- Always include Audio — VEO3 generates native audio, this is its biggest feature
- For dialogue: write exact words in double quotes for perfect lip-sync
- Use professional film terminology for camera work
- Be specific about lighting — golden hour, harsh shadows, soft diffused, neon glow etc
- Mention realistic physics and natural movements for better quality
- Optimize for 8-second pacing — what happens start to finish

STYLE MAPPING:
- Cinematic: use 'Cinematic widescreen style, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field'
- Documentary: use 'Documentary footage style, natural lighting, handheld camera feel'
- Commercial: use 'Commercial advertisement style, bright clean lighting, product showcase feel'
- Animation: use '3D cartoon animation style, vibrant colors, stylized render'
- Action: use 'Dynamic action cinematography, fast tracking shots, motion blur, high energy'
